automationScript.name: Complete One-Line Execution (Optional)
automationScript.script: cd /Users/ludodebruyn/Desktop/Skills && git add *.json *.md *.sh && git commit -m 'feat: Nomad & Soul Klaviyo v3 integration blueprints' && git push origin main && PARENT="1i_awMZ_HpDCRWUQmEPi1xZCNgmLVz84k" && for file in *.json VALIDATION-REPORT.md; do gdrive upload --parent $PARENT $file; done && echo '✅ All uploads complete'
automationScript.note: This is a single command chain - paste it all at once into terminal

testAndVerify.name: Test Klaviyo v3 API Compatibility
testAndVerify.description: Validate JSON payload works with Klaviyo API
testAndVerify.prerequisite: You need your Klaviyo API key (from https://www.klaviyo.com/account/developers/api-keys)

commands.description: Set your API key as variable
commands.note: Replace YOUR_ACTUAL_KLAVIYO_API_KEY with real key from Klaviyo account

commands.expectedResponse: 202 Accepted or error with helpful Klaviyo message

commands.command: cat /Users/ludodebruyn/Desktop/Skills/klaviyo-trigger-blueprint.json | python3 -m json.tool > /dev/null && echo '✅ JSON valid' || echo '❌ JSON invalid'
commands.note: No API key needed - just checks if JSON is well-formed

issues.solution:
git remote -v | grep push  # Check your remote URL
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:YOUR_USERNAME/YOUR_REPO.git

gdrive about  # Re-authenticate
Then re-run upload commands
Check that all template variables ({{ METRIC_ID_STARTED_CHECKOUT }}, etc.) are replaced with real values

issues.problem: Files show as untracked after commit
issues.solution:
git status  # Check what's untracked
git add [filename]  # Add specific file
git commit --amend  # Amend last commit

klaviyo-trigger-blueprint.json.purpose: Started Checkout event payload with CategorySuggestion
